results.title: Van Veen wins Dutch thriller
results.description: Darts results: Gian van Veen defeats Wessel Nijman at World Matchplay as Cameron Menzies withdraws due to illness

results.title: Is MSCI (MSCI) Fully Valued On Higher Expense Guidance After Earnings?
results.description: MSCI (MSCI) posted second quarter revenue of US$867 million and net income of US$342 million, with adjusted earnings per share slightly below consensus and a higher full year expense outlook tied to the First Street acquisition. See our latest analysis for MSCI. MSCI’s latest earnings update and higher expense outlook arrived after a period where momentum has cooled, with the share price at US$570.95 and a 90 day share price return decline of 4.52%, while the 1 year total shareholder return...
